description: Ever wanted to explore where your Sim is REALLY from? Hopefully this mod can help you do that! This mod introduces native types, accents, passports, and more!
title: Origins

description: Basically, this mod allows you to give your Sims the chance to become simfluencers and create their own brand. For this, I created a 5 level Simfluencer skill that prepares them for a life of being a content creator. As they progress in this Simfluencer skill, they will have access to more interactions and opportunities. Two of them being receiving paid sponsorships and partnerships from BIG name companies.
title: Better Brand Sponsorships

description: Have you ever wanted to give your Sim a particular age for better storytelling? This mini mod makes it possible for you to give your Sims actual ages!
title: Timelines

description: So, I created a storytelling mod, that attempts to create a natural emotion system through the seasons. This mod allows your Sims to get happy or sad during the season of your choice.
title: Seasonal Emotions

description: I always thought the Romantic trait was a little general. So, I created this mini mod that allows you to give your Sims a lover type. This mod is available for Young Adults-Elders and is also Base Game Compatible!
title: Romantica

description: The Reality Show drama mod makes it possible for you to turn your Sims drama filled dreams, into a reality…literally. This mod comes with custom social and computer interactions that can simulate a reality show experience and fill your game with drama.
title: Reality Show Drama

description: Simvanced Degrees is a mod that allows your Sim to attend graduate school. It comes with custom interactions such as choosing a graduate program, choosing funding/grants, and applying for assistantships.
title: Simvanced Degrees

description: Ever wanted your Sim to be good and evil? Family oriented with commitment issues? An outgoing loner? This mod Override the tuning for the conflict system in CAS and allows for dual personalities…kind of.
title: No Conflicting Traits

description: Beauty and Blush is a mini mod that allows your Sim to gain a new makeup skill. This skill comes with different social and computer interactions.
title: Beauty and Blush

description: Gone are the days where your Sims can simply go to the career panel and select a job. With this mod, your sim will have to pass an interview AND have a required degree.
title: Plumjob

description: I wanted to bring you all my first official mod of 2025: Little Miss Drama! it’s a small overhaul of dramatic conversation interactions for your game.  It’s slightly similar to my Holiday Drama Mod but adds more general conversation to spice up your game!
title: Little Miss Drama

description: Has your Sim been working hard this year or were they hardly working? Who cares! This mini mod allows your Sim to receive a Christmas bonus for their hard (or not so hard) work. You can use this for storytelling purposes, while also giving your Sims the chance to earn a few extra simoleons!
title: Christmas Bonus

description: So, it’s time for the holidays. What better way to bring it in than with some good ole’ holiday drama. Maybe your Sim has something to get off of their chest; or maybe they want to stir up a little drama for fun. Whatever the reason, this mini mod allows your Sim to cause a little chaos.
title: Holiday Drama

description: I love listening to lo-fi music, so I figured I’d create a mod for my Sims to enjoy as well! This mod adds a lo-fi station to the game; perfect for studying, reading, or just vibing to. It is also Base Game Compatible.
title: Lo-Fi Station

description: This mod is a modification of Scanner’s mod that allowed Sims to change into their towels after their showers/bath. I spoke to them about adopting this mod and tweaking the tag to allow Sims to instead change into robes and slippers after a shower/bath
title: Robe After Shower

description: You’ve probably already noticed that we don’t have a career outfit category in CAS or ANY option for a Sim to change into their uniform before work.
title: Career Outfit on Dresser

description: Bright Start is an overhaul of twelve (12) custom opening screen and loading screen Override that come in vibrant colors!
title: Bright Start: An Overhaul of Override

description: I created a mod that allows your Sims to go to virtual therapy from the comfort of their homes or wherever they are! This mod is available for Teens-Elders.
title: Virtual Therapy

description: So, I recently fell in love with the concept of having an Override on the opening screen when loading into the game. Even though the screen loads pretty quickly, I felt inspired to create a few of them, inspired by Studio Ghibli movies.
title: Ghibli: Entry Screens

description: This mini mod that adds five (5) part time paid internships for your teen Sims which allows them to work on their skills.
title: Simternships

description: I always get annoyed when Sims change back into their everyday outfit after a jog. That’s not realistic to me. This mod Override that and allows them to stay in their workout fit after jogging: either by themselves or with dogs.
title: No Auto Change After Jogging

description: Does your Sim have what it takes to be a lawyer? have them find out in law school. With this version, your Sim will be able to actively experience a day at a law school with professors, lawyers, and other law students.
title: Law Student Mod (Version 2)

description: This mod that allows your Sims to have their own! PlumbPod Podcasts allows your Sim to have a mini podcast hobby, all the while making some simoleons on the side. Your Sim will also have the opportunity to gain fame!
title: Plumpod Podcasts

description: This mod allows your Sim to have an attachment style. Each attachment style comes with unique interactions and buffs.
title: Attachment Styles

description: Does your Sim have what it takes to be a top-notch law student? Find out with this career mod that allows your Sim to do just that!
title: Law Student Mod (Version 1)

description: Here are a few moody main menus Override for your game. Remember you can only have one Override in your game at a time.
title: Moody: Main Menu Override

description: Here are a few more aesthetic main menu Override. These are more so moody/nature inspired. With these Override, remember to only put ONE in your game at time.
title: Aesthetic: Main Menus

description: Here are a few Studio Ghibli main menu Override for your game. As always with all Override, only CHOOSE ONE to place in your mods folder at a time. Read more and download
title: Ghibli: Main Menu Override

description: So, I got tired of my Sims looking clownish after they applied the EA makeup from the vanity table lol. This Override allows your Sim to still perform the Apply Makeup interaction, at the vanity table without actually applying the makeup.
title: No EA Makeup

description: Does your Sim have what it takes to start and complete medical school? Maybe this mod can help you find out. In this version, your Sim will be able to attend medical school in person.
title: Medical Student (Version 2)

description: Have you ever wanted your Sims to go to medical school before entering the doctor career? Or maybe your Sim just wants to go to medical school for the hell of it! Well, this mod is what you’re looking for.
title: Medical Student (Version 1)

description: Ever wished your Sims had the perfect book to complement their self-care vibes, but the books in game didn’t match the aesthetic? Well, this cc is for you! Zen Pages introduces 18 self-care/self-improvement books, covering everything from skincare secrets to mastering the art of setting boundaries.
title: Zen Pages

description: This mini mod, that adds 5 corporate rabbithole careers to the game and a few interactions.
title: Get Corporate
